mapper.select: select h.product_id as productId, p.name as productName, p.price as price, coalesce(s.sales, 0) as sales, img.image_url as coverImage, h.view_count as viewCount, h.first_view_time as firstViewTime, h.last_view_time as lastViewTime from mall_product_view_history h left join mall_product p on h.product_id = p.id left join ( select product_id, min(image_url) as image_url from mall_product_image where is_deleted = 0 group by product_id ) img on img.product_id = h.product_id left join ( select moi.product_id as product_id, sum(moi.quantity) as sales from mall_order_item moi inner join mall_order mo on moi.order_id = mo.id where moi.is_deleted = 0 and mo.is_deleted = 0 and mo.order_status = 'COMPLETED' group by moi.product_id ) s on s.product_id = h.product_id where h.user_id = #{userId} order by h.last_view_time desc, h.id desc
